---
title: "A Perfect Circle"
description: "6.24-mile run, one mile per round — a perfect circle."
author: "synesis"
date: "2023-12-14"
categories: [running, personal]
image: cover.jpg
---

![Six laps, one mile each. A perfect circle.](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

It's a perfect (6.24-mile) circle!

(one mile per round)


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_running-mothership-activity-7141273079493648385-xt2Z).*
